diff:
diff --git a/src/pathjoin.py b/src/pathjoin.py
index 1e2ffc2..3359434 100644
--- a/src/pathjoin.py
+++ b/src/pathjoin.py
@@ -1,3 +1,11 @@
 def join_segments(segments):
-    cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments if segment]
-    return "/".join(cleaned)
+    if not segments:
+        return ""
+    if segments[0] == "":
+        # Absolute path: preserve leading root marker
+        cleaned = ["" if i == 0 else segment.strip("/") for i, segment in enumerate(segments) if segment or i == 0]
+        return "/".join(cleaned) or "/"
+    else:
+        # Relative path: remove empty segments and strip slashes
+        cleaned = [segment.strip("/") for segment in segments if segment]
+        return "/".join(cleaned)
